title: Akshay Sachthey rejoins Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas as Partner in General Corporate practice
description: Akshay Sachthey has rejoined Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co as a Partner in the General Corporate Practice in Delhi.Prior to rejoining SAM, Sachthey was associated with Pine Labs as Director - Legal, where he led legal for global mergers and acquisitions and strategic investments, as well as the prepaid solutions business across multiple jurisdictions.Sachthey is an alumnus of Campus Law Centre, Faculty Of Law, University of Delhi.He has over a decade of experience advising on a broad rang
